meaning: n.[动]牧羊狗(一种高大聪敏长毛的牧羊狗)
examples: The children seemed to tumble about and amuse themselves like a litter of rough, good-natured collie puppies.
Even the family's collie was bitten.
"Papa," I said, "I don't want an old collie dog."
In his spare time John likes to walk his dog Christie, a cheeky cross collie.
The collie was hanging its head out the window, obstructing the driver-side mirror, she says.
